title: Listing Example - Talks
text:
Date



Title



Description



venue








Mar 12, 2025


From Notebook to Production: Deploying ML Models with Confidence


A practical walkthrough of taking a model out of a Jupyter notebook and into a reproducible, monitored production pipeline—covering containers, CI/CD, and drift detection.


PyData Seattle






Nov 8, 2024


The Art of the Reproducible Report


Why your analysis should run end-to-end with a single command, and how literate programming tools like Quarto make stakeholder-ready reports painless.


posit::conf






Jun 4, 2024


Causal Inference for the Skeptical Analyst


Correlation isn’t causation, but we can do better than throwing up our hands. An accessible tour of difference-in-differences, propensity scores, and when to trust them.


useR! Conference

title: Listing Example - Projects
text:
Coastal Sensor Network



IoT

Time Series

Dashboards



Real-time monitoring of water quality along the Oregon coast using a fleet of low-cost IoT sensors.

















Forest Canopy Mapping



Geospatial

Machine Learning

Remote Sensing



Estimating canopy cover and forest health from satellite imagery with a reproducible geospatial pipeline.

















Watershed Flow Forecasting



Machine Learning

Time Series

Forecasting



Predicting seasonal streamflow across the Cascades to support water management and flood planning.

title: Forest Canopy Mapping
text:
Placeholder content. This project classifies multispectral imagery to map canopy density and flag early signs of stress, packaged as a reproducible pipeline that re-runs as new imagery lands.
Photo by Dale Nibbe on Unsplash.

title: Jacob Armitage
text: Jacob Armitage is an Epidemiologist interested in Population Health Science, Demography, and their interactions with the Climate Crisis.

title: Jacob Armitage
text:
Education
University of Washington - M.S. Genetic Epidemiology | June 2023
Rutgers University - B.S. Biotechnology | May 2020

title: Jacob Armitage
text:
Experience
Assessment and Evaluation Epidemiologist  - Thurston County Public Health and Social Services | March 2025 - Current
Research Coordinator - Seattle Epidemiological Research and Information Center, Department of Veterans Affairs | May 2024 - March 2025
Graduate Teaching Assistant - University of Washington Institute for Public Health Genetics | March 2023 - June 2023
Graduate Research Assistant - University of Washington Population Health Initiative | June 2022 - Dec 2022
Molecular Biologist - Sequencing Core - Delaware Department of Health and Social Services | July 2020 - July 2021

title: Watershed Flow Forecasting
text:
Placeholder content. A forecasting model blends snowpack, precipitation, and historical gauge data to project streamflow weeks ahead, with uncertainty bands that planners can actually act on.
Photo by Cristofer Maximilian on Unsplash.
